# OpenFeature Operator Tutorials

## 📄️Quick Start: Cloud Native Feature-Flagging with the OpenFeature Operator

In the following tutorial, we'll see how to leverage flagd and the OpenFeature Operator to enable cloud-native, self-hosted feature flags in your Kubernetes cluster. flagd is a "feature flag daemon with a Unix philosophy".

## 📄️In-Process and Client-side Evaluation with flagd and OpenFeature Operator

This tutorial outlines some of the advanced features and configurations supported by the OpenFeature operator and flagd.
